holdings.infoBox: QYLD is an equity ETF with a total of 104 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.54%, Apple at 7.20%, Micron Technology at 5.60%, Microsoft at 4.91%, and Amazon.com at 4.37%.

overview.description: The Global X NASDAQ 100 Covered Call ETF (QYLD) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Cboe NASDAQ-100 BuyWrite V2 index. The fund tracks an index that holds Nasdaq 100 stocks and sells call options on those stocks to collect the premiums. QYLD was launched on Dec 12, 2013 and is issued by Global X.
